'''Liyha''' was the sixth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]]. It was an icy wasteland.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
